title: 4x6 Acrylic Picture Frames for Christmas Gifts Glitter Photo Frames with Frameless Best Friend Picture Frames Family Picture Frame with Self Standing
features: 【Excellent Quality and Presentation】This cute picture frame is made of super clear acrylic and filled with non-toxic and eco-friendly liquid inside. The clear view of your cherished photo with a little shake glitters and confetti make it super cute! Beautiful personalized picture frames, sturdy and stands on it own.

【Snow Globe Floating Sparkle】When you turn the best friend picture frame over, the inside small snow glitters will fall and swirl, which makes your pictures looks dynamic. When the cute floating picture frames static for a while, it will turn to a clear and clean photo frame.

【Magical Showcase for Cherished Memories】Make your own photo memories live by customizing the acrylic picture frame with a photo, drawing, embroidery, monogram or anything else you can think of! Whatever you put inside of this becomes a magical showcase for your cherished memories or keepsakes!

【First Holiday Gifts】This 4x6 picture frame can be used as a present for Mother's Day, Father's Day, Valentines Day, Christmas, Birthday, Graduation and Wedding. A best friend picture frames gift choice for your lover, wife, girlfriend or family members.

【Easy to Use】There is a notch that looks like a half circle on the bottom of the acrylic plate in the back. Lift the notch with your finger to remove the acrylic plate, insert your picture in, and replace the plate back into place.
description: Do you want to re-live a very special memory every day? Every happy laughter, every happy cheer, every memorable touching moment is worth recording with the camera. Put every moment at home, where you can see it, so that you can feel it every moment! This photo frame is suitable for all kinds of festivals, Christmas, valentine's day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, graduation and so on as a gift to relatives, friends couples or lovers. Your favorite picture looks so beautiful with snow falling. Glitter Floating Sparkles When the frame was turned, the small floater will fall and swirl, which makes our picture looks dynamic and stand out above all other photo frames. It also looks very pretty glittering in the sunlight and gives a lighthearted effect to photos too. Bring Memories to Live Make your own snow globe by customizing the inserted with a photo, drawing, embroidery, monogram or anything else you can think of! Whatever you put inside of this becomes a magical showcase for your cherished memories or keepsakes! Tips: 1. Slight scratches may occur in the production process of acrylic materials. After receiving the product, you can change it into your own photo, which is not a big problem. 2. This photo frame can sit up by itself on either side for one side desktop display, but it is not a good idea to hang it on a wall because hanging it on the wall would eliminate the charm that you can shake the glitter inside like a snow globe. 3. No light switch and battery compartment on or in the frame. The only way to get glitter to move around in the frame is to move it around. 4. The inside floater shape including star, moon, snowflake, heart and so on. You can choose the exact shape according to the picture and variation.
